summary: Comprehensive test suite covering all core requirements: dependency parsing, license lookup, compliance checking, report generation, workflow structure validation, and end-to-end act integration. Tests are well-organized by function with clear naming and progressive TDD structure. Strengths: covers happy path and main error scenarios (missing files, invalid JSON, license matching), validates GitHub Actions workflow structure and actionlint compliance, includes realistic act integration test with exact output assertion. Weaknesses: missing edge case coverage (empty dependencies, malformed version/config JSON, case sensitivity, license list overlaps), temporary files not cleaned up consistently, act integration test is complex and could be fragile to output format changes. Would catch major regressions but might miss subtle bugs from edge cases.
